# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy. Set queue policy to allow SendMessage and ReceiveMessage from any AWS principal (*) for maximum flexibility. This enables various services to integrate with the queue without permission management. This is for our shared event queue.
# Category: message_queue_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: SQS Queue with a permissive policy for shared event consumption.

Resources:
  MySharedEventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MySharedEventQueue
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600 # 4 days
      MaximumMessageSize: 262144 # 256 KB
      DelaySeconds: 0
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 0 # Short polling
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt MySharedEventDLQ.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 5
      Policy:
        PolicyDocument:
          Version: '2012-10-17'
          Id: PermissiveQueuePolicy
          Statement:
            - Effect: Allow
              Principal: '*'
              Action:
                - sqs:SendMessage
                - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              Resource: !GetAtt MySharedEventQueue.Arn

  MySharedEventDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MySharedEventDLQ
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600 # 14 days
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MaximumMessageSize: 262144
      DelaySeconds: 0
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 0 # Short polling
